id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the skill

description.description: Short description of what the skill provides

triggers.description: List of strings that trigger this skill during context assembly

requires.description: List of skill IDs this skill depends on

conflicts.description: List of skill IDs that cannot be loaded alongside this one

maxTokens.description: Hint for context assembly about the size of this skill

applies-to.description: List of tool IDs this skill is relevant for
